priceMatch.title: Found a Better Rate?
priceMatch.description: We'll help you find the best hotel cashback rates. Compare rates across booking sites and maximize your savings on every stay.

items.question: How do I earn cashback on hotel bookings?
items.answer: Simply click through Cashog to your preferred hotel booking site, complete your reservation as usual, and cashback will be automatically tracked and added to your account.

items.question: Can I combine cashback with hotel loyalty programs?
items.answer: Yes! Most hotel booking sites allow you to earn both cashback and loyalty points simultaneously. Just make sure to enter your loyalty number during checkout.

items.question: How long does hotel cashback take to confirm?
items.answer: Hotel cashback typically takes 30-60 days to confirm after your stay is completed. This accounts for cancellation periods and stay verification.

items.question: What if I need to cancel my booking?
items.answer: If you cancel a booking, the cashback will not be credited. If you've already received it, it will be deducted from your account.

items.question: Do all hotels qualify for cashback?
items.answer: Most hotels on our partner sites qualify, but some exclusions may apply (e.g., non-refundable rates, certain chains). Check site terms for details.

items.question: Can I earn cashback on prepaid hotel bookings?
items.answer: Yes! Prepaid bookings are eligible for cashback. The cashback will be confirmed after your stay is completed.

items.question: What about Airbnb and vacation rentals?
items.answer: Yes! Many vacation rental platforms like Airbnb and Vrbo are also eligible for cashback through our partner sites.

items.question: Do I need to book directly through Cashog every time?
items.answer: Yes, to ensure cashback tracking, you must start your booking session by clicking through Cashog to the partner site.

final.title: Start Saving on Hotel Stays Today
final.subtitle: Join thousands of travelers earning cashback on every hotel booking
